subject: Lane_01 re-review request for AIER Code canon/spec stack v0.2 candidates
body: Please re-review the five v0.2 candidate revisions under docs/LAW_CLA_LLM/SHARED/amendments/pending/AMD_LANE03_AIER_CODE_CANON_SPEC_STACK_2026-04-26/revisions/. Check whether master canon label convention is fixed, memory current_state schema mismatch is safely resolved, lane federation vendor identity contradiction is fixed, capability/backend taxonomy is unified, no new authority drift was introduced, and candidates are ready for NTS decision or need another amendment. Boundary: review evidence only, not approval; NTS final approval is required. Expected verdicts: ENDORSE / ENDORSE_WITH_NOTES / AMEND / OBJECT / DEFER / SPLIT.
requested_action: Provide Lane_01 CTO re-review of the five AIER Code canon/spec stack v0.2 candidate revisions.
acceptance_criteria: Lane_01 verifies the master canon label convention fix.
Lane_01 verifies the memory current_state schema mismatch was resolved safely.
Lane_01 verifies the lane federation vendor identity contradiction was fixed.
Lane_01 checks no new authority drift was introduced.
Lane_01 states whether candidates are ready for NTS decision or need another amendment.
Lane_01 returns ENDORSE, ENDORSE_WITH_NOTES, AMEND, OBJECT, DEFER, or SPLIT.
